root_text.an3.142:1.1: “Tayo ca, bhikkhave, bhadre assājānīye desessāmi tayo ca bhadre purisājānīye.
root_text.an3.142:1.2: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.an3.142:1.3: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an3.142:2.3: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an3.142:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo bhadrā assājānīyā.
root_text.an3.142:3.1: Katame ca, bhikkhave, tayo bhadrā purisājānīyā?
root_text.an3.142:3.3: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an3.142:4.2: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca?
root_text.an3.142:4.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āsavānaṁ khayā anāsavaṁ cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharati.
root_text.an3.142:4.5: Abhidhamme kho pana abhivinaye pañhaṁ puṭṭho vissajjeti, no saṁsādeti.
root_text.an3.142:4.9: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhadro purisājānīyo javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an3.142:4.10: Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo bhadrā purisājānīyā”ti.

translation_text.an3.142:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you the three fine thoroughbred horses, and the three fine thoroughbred people.
translation_text.an3.142:1.2: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.an3.142:2.1: “What are the three fine thoroughbred horses?
translation_text.an3.142:2.3: is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an3.142:2.4: These are the three fine thoroughbred horses.
translation_text.an3.142:3.1: And what are the three fine thoroughbred people?
translation_text.an3.142:3.3: is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an3.142:4.1: And how is a fine thoroughbred person …
translation_text.an3.142:4.3: It’s when a mendicant realizes the undefiled freedom of heart and freedom by wisdom in this very life. And they live having realized it with their own insight due to the ending of defilements.
translation_text.an3.142:4.4: This is how they’re fast, I say.
translation_text.an3.142:4.5: When asked a question about the teaching or training, they answer without faltering.
translation_text.an3.142:4.6: This is how they’re beautiful, I say.
translation_text.an3.142:4.7: They receive robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an3.142:4.8: This is how they’re well proportioned, I say.
translation_text.an3.142:4.9: This is how a fine thoroughbred person is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an3.142:4.10: These are the three fine thoroughbred people.”
